article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.4. Attachment 2 - Draft Burnaby Loan Authorization (BHA Edmonds Project Loan Guarantee) Bylaw 2026 2026.01.27.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to Guarantee $95M Loan for Edmonds Housing Development
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would allow the City of Burnaby to guarantee a $95 million loan for the Burnaby Housing Authority (BHA) to build housing near Marine Drive and Bevan Street in the Edmonds area.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — this large housing project could affect local construction and property markets.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Finance & Insurance
